title: armeria maritima subsp. gaditana
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. gaditana, also known as sea thrift or dwarf thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily as a diuretic and to treat urinary issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. gaditana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
